title: Chytroma congestiflora
taxonomy: Chytroma congestiflora is classified within the family Chytromataceae. This classification places it in the division Ascomycota and the phylum Ascomycota. Chytroma congestiflora is further categorized as a genus and species within the kingdom Fungi. More specifically, it falls under the order Chytridiales. The classification of Chytroma congestiflora is still a subject of ongoing research in the field of mycology.
